applied_modifiers.name: poc_01_02_isomorphic_pattern
applied_modifiers.reason: 5 재현 + 2 비재현 (Bearer 학습 효과 ) — §8.1 cross-platform 입증

applied_penalties.name: no_operational_db
applied_penalties.reason: MySQL 운영 DB 미접근 + nest start 부재

human_review_reasons: AP-AUTH-NEST-001 critical (5 endpoint cumul) — 사내 적용 시 즉시 수정 의무
AP-DB-001 critical — DB UQ + FK + race window 4건 cumul
AP-PERFORMANCE-001 medium → high 격상 (PoC #01+#02+#03 3 PoC 재현 권위)
Phase 4.5 cross-link 9 op = 방법론 본질 가치 입증 데이터
F-161 positive (Bearer 표준) = NestJS 학습 효과 입증

antipatterns.title: NestJS Auth scope 결여 — 5 endpoint anonymous 호출 가능 + JWT verify 무방어 + login 메시지 모호
antipatterns.description: AuthMiddleware (UserModule.forRoutes) 가 user GET/PUT 만 적용. DELETE /users/:slug + Article 4 endpoint (update/delete/createComment/deleteComment) 가 anonymous 호출 가능. JWT verify 가 try/catch 부재로 만료 시 503/uncaught throw. login error 'User not found' 가 user 부재/password 불일치 양쪽 포괄 (OWASP A07 user enumeration).
antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: OWASP API5 (Broken Function Level Authorization) + OWASP A07 (Identification and Authentication Failures) + OWASP A04 (Insecure Design)
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: NestJS 7+ 권장 = @nestjs/passport + LocalStrategy + JwtStrategy + @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard) + ownership check

migration_advice.design: @nestjs/passport 도입 + LocalStrategy + JwtStrategy + JwtAuthGuard 글로벌 적용 (또는 endpoint 별 @UseGuards). ownership check Service 단 의무 (req.user.id === target).
migration_advice.ci: supertest E2E — 익명 요청에 대한 401 검증 + ownership 검증 (다른 user 의 자원 수정/삭제 시도 → 403)
migration_advice.team_training: OWASP API Security Top 10 + NestJS Authentication 공식 docs

cross_poc_validation.poc_01: AP-SECURITY-001 (JWT 21byte critical) — 변형 재현 ( JWT 자체 약점 / PoC #03 = scope 결여)
cross_poc_validation.poc_02: AP-SECURITY-001 (RSA git commit critical) — 변형 재현 ( key management / PoC #03 = scope 결여)
cross_poc_validation.poc_03_unique: Auth scope 결여 — 3 PoC 모두 SECURITY critical 동형 영역 ✅

antipatterns.title: DB UQ + FK 부재 + race window — User username/email + Article slug + Follows pair + favoriteCount race
antipatterns.description: DB level race-safety 보장 부재. 4 영역 결함 cumul: User username/email UQ 부재 (App pre-check 1중 / race-prone), Follows (followerId, followingId) UQ pair 부재 + FK user.id 참조 부재 (orphan row 가능), Article slug UQ 부재 (Math.random suffix 의존), favoriteCount race window (App 1중 isNewFavorite check / DB FOR UPDATE 부재).

evidence_files.path: src/profile/follows.entity.ts — followerId/followingId Column 단순 / FK 부재
src/article/article.service.ts — favorite isNewFavorite check 후 push (App 1중)

antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: Sairyss DDD-Hexagon 정설 + Codd 1970 (Relational Model: 무결성 제약은 DB level)
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: DB UQ 단독 + catch QueryFailedError → ConflictException (race-safe + idempotent)

migration_advice.design: TypeORM @Index({unique: true}) + @JoinColumn FK + @Check constraint (CHECK follower_id <> following_id) + transactional FOR UPDATE 또는 atomic INCREMENT
migration_advice.ci: 테이블 SHOW CREATE TABLE 검증 + DB UQ 충돌 시뮬레이션 E2E (concurrent INSERT 동시 발사) + race window 측정
migration_advice.team_training: Joe Celko's SQL for Smarties §UNIQUE constraint + Vlad Mihalcea High-Performance Java Persistence §16 (Optimistic Locking)

cross_poc_validation.poc_02: AP-DOMAIN-002 (race-prone unique) — isomorphic + 더 나쁨 (PoC #02 = App+DB 2중 / PoC #03 = App 1중 only)
cross_poc_validation.poc_03_addition: FK 자체 부재 (PoC #02 는 FK 있음 / PoC #03 은 FK 도 부재) + favoriteCount race

antipatterns.title: spec/runtime status code drift — NestJS default + ApiResponse decorator + RFC 9110 다중 위반 (5 op)
antipatterns.description: 5 op 가 spec/runtime drift: login NestJS @Post default 201 (RFC 9110 §15.3.2 신규 자원 ❌ → 200 권고), Article DELETE/POST/PUT 의 @ApiResponse 데코 201 (RFC 9110 §15.3.5 권고 204 / RFC 9110 §6.5 권고 200 위반). Spec/runtime drift 동시.
antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: RFC 9110 §15.3.2 (201 Created — 신규 자원 URI 시만) + §15.3.5 (DELETE → 204) + §6.5 (Update success 200)
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: GitHub API / Stripe API / Twitter API 모두 DELETE → 204 + login → 200 + Update → 200

migration_advice.design: @HttpCode(200) login + @HttpCode(204) DELETE + @ApiResponse status 정정 의무. NestJS @Post 의 default 201 함정 ADR 등록.
migration_advice.ci: supertest 또는 Jest spec/runtime drift 검증 — ApiResponse decorator vs 실 status assertion
migration_advice.team_training: RFC 9110 (HTTP Semantics) + NestJS HttpCode 공식 docs

cross_poc_validation.poc_02: AP-API-001 (favorite RFC 7231 §4.2.2) + F-085 (login status drift) + F-083 (DELETE 200) — isomorphic 합산  재현

static_rule_link.scope: @Delete + @ApiResponse({status: 201}) decorator drift 자동 회귀.  article.controller.ts:65,68 + 81,85 + 97,99  4 op 정확 매칭. login @Post default 201 (RFC 9110 §15.3.2) =  별 mechanism / pattern-not-inside @HttpCode 의 정확한 Semgrep 표현 한계 → ts-morph carry (v1.5+).
static_rule_link.carry: ts-morph NestJS @HttpCode + @Post + @ApiResponse 결합 decorator semantic 분석 (v1.5+ 진입 시점)

antipatterns.title: class-validator coverage 12% — UpdateUserDto / CreateArticleDto / CreateCommentDto 0 validator + UserService.update validate 미호출
antipatterns.description: class-validator 데코레이터가 50+ 필드 중 6 필드만 적용 (12%). UpdateUserDto / CreateArticleDto / CreateCommentDto 가 0 validator. UserService.update 가 validate(newUser) 미호출 → @IsEmail 우회 가능. follow self-check email vs unFollow self-check id 차원 불일치 (Domain invariant 부재).
antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: OWASP API1 (Broken Object Level Authorization — mass assignment 잠재)
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: Bean Validation + class-validator 의 표준 = 모든 input DTO + entity field validator + Domain invariant constructor enforcement

migration_advice.design: DTO 모든 필드 @IsNotEmpty / @IsString / @IsEmail / @MaxLength 의무 + ValidationPipe global (main.ts app.useGlobalPipes(new ValidationPipe())) + Domain Aggregate constructor invariant (FollowsEntity 생성자 throw if followerId === followingId)
migration_advice.ci: supertest negative test 의무 — empty / null / overflow / invalid email 등 boundary 케이스 + ArchUnit 동등 (controller 가 ValidationPipe 적용 검증)
migration_advice.team_training: Sairyss DDD-Hexagon README §5 (Domain Invariants) + class-validator docs

cross_poc_validation.poc_02: PoC #02 = Bean Validation 풍부 (UserCreateRequest 7+ validator) —  학습 효과 반대 (PoC #03 부족 식별)

antipatterns.title: EAGER N+1 + favoriteCount race window — 3 PoC 재현 권위 (medium → high 격상 )
antipatterns.description: @OneToMany comments eager:true → article list/find 시 N+1 쿼리. favoriteCount = favorites.length App level 보장 / DB level FOR UPDATE 부재 → 동시 favorite 시 count 2회 증가 race window. 3 PoC (PoC #01 F-006 + PoC #02 F-051 + PoC #03 F-124+F-135) 모두 재현 →  medium → high 격상 권위 충분.

evidence_files.path: src/article/article.service.ts favorite — isNewFavorite check + push + favoriteCount++ (App 1중)

antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: Vlad Mihalcea High-Performance Java Persistence §3.4 (LazyInitializationException 회피 위해 EAGER 의 안티패턴) + Joe Celko §Concurrency
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: Spring Data JPA + Hibernate 정설 = LAZY default + @EntityGraph/@Query fetch join 명시 + @Version optimistic lock 또는 atomic UPDATE counter

migration_advice.design: TypeORM @OneToMany eager:false default + 명시적 relations: ['comments'] / favoriteCount = atomic UPDATE COUNT(*) 또는 @Version optimistic lock + transaction FOR UPDATE
migration_advice.ci: JPA query log + count 분석 (N+1 검출) + race window 시뮬레이션 (k6 concurrent favorite)
migration_advice.team_training: Hibernate Tips & Tricks (Vlad Mihalcea) + TypeORM eager loading 함정 ADR

cross_poc_validation.poc_02: F-051 EAGER N+1 ✅ 재현 (medium → high 격상 후보)
cross_poc_validation.poc_03: F-124 EAGER + F-135 race window  재현 + 추가 결함
cross_poc_validation.promotion_authority: 3 PoC 재현 권위 — v1.3 격상 시 high 격상 정식 데이터

antipatterns.title: API versioning 부재 + GET /articles limit no maximum cap (OWASP API4)
antipatterns.description: main.ts setGlobalPrefix('api') 단일 / no /v1 → backward compatibility 미보장. GetArticles limit query parameter 가 maximum cap 부재 → DB overload 가능 (OWASP API4: Lack of Resources & Rate Limiting).

evidence_files.path: src/article/article.service.ts findAll — limit 사용 (max 검증 부재)

antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: OWASP API4 (Unrestricted Resource Consumption) + Stripe API 가이드라인 (versioning)
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: URI versioning (/v1) 또는 header versioning + limit max cap (예: 50)

migration_advice.ci: OpenAPI breaking change 검증 (oasdiff) + load test 가 limit max 초과 시 400 검증
migration_advice.team_training: Stripe API Versioning + OWASP API Top 10

antipatterns.title: PUT 부분 갱신 — UpdateUser + UpdateArticle (RFC 5789 PATCH 권고)
antipatterns.description: PUT /api/user (UpdateUserDto 모든 필드 optional) + PUT /api/articles/:slug (CreateArticleDto reuse) 이 부분 갱신 의도 / RFC 5789 PATCH 권고 위반. PUT 은 RFC 9110 §9.3.4 entity replacement 의미.
antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: RFC 5789 (PATCH Method for HTTP) + RFC 9110 §9.3.4 (PUT semantics)
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: GitHub API / Stripe API 모두 부분 갱신은 PATCH (application/merge-patch+json or json-patch+json)

migration_advice.design: @Patch(':slug') + application/merge-patch+json content type + UpdateArticleDto 분리 (CreateArticleDto reuse 금지)
migration_advice.ci: OpenAPI spec 검증 + supertest method assertion

antipatterns.title: Domain invariant 부재 — FollowsEntity 생성자 + Tag aggregate dead + slug 미업데이트 TODO
antipatterns.description: FollowsEntity 생성자 invariant 부재 (followerId === followingId 검증 ❌). Tag aggregate 가 dead (TagController findAll 만 / 다른 곳 미사용). Article update 시 slug 미업데이트 (article.controller.ts:61 TODO 주석).

evidence_files.path: src/tag/tag.service.ts — findAll 1 endpoint / Aggregate Root 모호
src/article/article.controller.ts:61 // Todo: update slug also when title gets changed

antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: Sairyss DDD-Hexagon (Aggregate invariant constructor) + Vernon IDDD §10 (Aggregate)
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: Aggregate constructor 가 invariant 검증 의무 (Eric Evans DDD Blue Book §5)

migration_advice.design: FollowsEntity 생성자 throw if followerId === followingId + Tag Aggregate 책임 명시 (aggregate root vs supporting entity 결정) + Article setTitle 시 slug regenerate
migration_advice.ci: ArchUnit 또는 ts-morph rule — Aggregate constructor invariant 적용 검증
migration_advice.team_training: Eric Evans DDD §5 (A Model Expressed in Software) + Sairyss DDD-Hexagon

cross_poc_validation.poc_02: double_hit — BR-USER-FOLLOW-NO-SELF-001 코드 부재 (PoC #02) ↔ 코드 존재 + 차원 불일치 (PoC #03)

antipatterns.title: Bounded Context 경계 약함 — cross-module entity InjectRepository (NestJS 단일 module 본질)
antipatterns.description: ProfileModule 이 UserEntity Repository 직접 InjectRepository → BC 경계 위반 (Profile 이 User domain 침투). FollowsEntity 위치 모호 (profile/ vs user/).

evidence_files.path: src/profile/follows.entity.ts — 위치 모호 (profile 이지만 User-Following 관계)

antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: Vernon IDDD §2 (Bounded Context) + NestJS Module 가이드
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: Bounded Context = entity 직접 참조 ❌ / inter-context = Anti-Corruption Layer 또는 Domain Event

migration_advice.design: UserService 추상 (interface) export → ProfileModule 이 import (Hexagonal port-adapter / NestJS Module forFeature 대신 Service injection)
migration_advice.team_training: Vernon IDDD §13 (Integrating Bounded Contexts) + Sairyss DDD-Hexagon README

cross_poc_validation.poc_02: J 묶음 (Hexagonal port-adapter) 반대 패턴 — PoC #02 = multi-module Hexagonal / PoC #03 = 단일 module 함정

antipatterns.title: JWT verify 3곳 DRY 위반 + AuthMiddleware legacy + dead code (BaseController, prisma/.env 잔재) + TagEntity 직접 노출
antipatterns.description: auth.middleware.ts 가 verify 3곳 (findMe / update / 그외) DRY 위반. BaseController 가 dead (사용 0). prisma/ 디렉토리에 .env 잔재 (master 는 TypeORM 단독). TagController 가 TagEntity 직접 노출 (Sairyss DDD-Hexagon 위반 — Repository 결과 → DTO 변환 부재).
antipatterns.rfc_owasp_authority: Robert C. Martin Clean Code §G5 (Duplication) + DDD-Hexagon (Output DTO 분리)
antipatterns.industry_standard_violation: 단일 책임 원칙 + DRY + 출력 DTO 변환 (Repository entity 직접 노출 금지)

migration_advice.design: JwtAuthGuard 단일 책임 (verify 1곳) + dead code 삭제 + TagEntity → TagDto 변환 (id+name 만 노출)
migration_advice.ci: ESLint dead code rule (no-unused-vars) + ts-morph TagEntity 노출 차단
migration_advice.team_training: Clean Code §G5 + DDD-Hexagon Output DTO 패턴

antipatterns.title: Controller path inconsistency — @Controller() 빈 prefix (UserController) + TagController @ApiBearerAuth 인지 불일치
antipatterns.description: UserController 가 @Controller() 빈 prefix 사용 (다른 controller 는 @Controller('articles') 등) → path 가 controller 내 분산 (user / users / users/:slug / users/login). TagController 가 @ApiBearerAuth() 데코 적용하나 실 endpoint 인증 불요 (Swagger UI 인지 불일치).

migration_advice.design: @Controller('users') + path 정리 (login → @Post('login')) + TagController @ApiBearerAuth 제거 (또는 endpoint 별 적용)
migration_advice.ci: ts-morph rule — @Controller decorator 빈 prefix 차단

_composite_view_metadata.summary: 5 endpoint anonymous 호출 + JWT verify 무방어 + login 모호. Phase 4.5 cross-link: BR-USER-DELETE-AUTH-001 (current_state: absent) + BR-USER-LOGIN-VERIFY-001 + BR-USER-JWT-EXPIRY-001
DB UQ + FK + race window. PoC #02 isomorphic + 더 나쁨. Phase 4.5 cross-link: BR-USER-USERNAME-EMAIL-UNIQUE-001 + BR-FOLLOWS-PAIR-UNIQUE-001 + BR-ARTICLE-FAVORITE-IDEMPOTENT-001
spec/runtime drift + versioning + PUT vs PATCH. PoC #02 5 isomorphic 합산 재현
Aggregate invariant 부재 + BC 경계 약함. PoC #02 J 묶음 반대 패턴 (단일 module 함정)

merged_or_dropped.rationale: F-164 critical 추가 (Phase 5-1) + F-150 추가 → 5 endpoint cumul critical

morphologically_reproduced: AP-SECURITY (PoC #01 JWT 21byte → PoC #03 Auth scope 결여)
AP-DB (PoC #01 UQ → PoC #03 UQ + FK + race)

morphologically_reproduced: AP-SECURITY-001 (RSA git commit) → AP-AUTH-NEST-001 (auth scope) — variant
not_reproduced_learning_effect: AP-API-008 (307 internal redirect) — NestJS framework 차이 (ModelAndView 미사용)
poc_02_21_ap_validation.F-084_token_apikey_to_F-161_bearer_stand: 학습 효과 입증 ✅ — NestJS addBearerAuth() 표준 (PoC #02 Token apiKey 비표준 비재현)

poc_03_unique: AP-AUTH-NEST-001  (NestJS Passport 미사용 + Auth scope 결여 — 5 endpoint critical)
